properties.displayName: Enforce existing SQL server Auditing is set to enabled
properties.description: Denies the disabling of auditing settings on a SQL Server.
nonComplianceMessages: SQL Server auditing settings do not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Ensure that (SQL Server) Auditing is 'Enabled'. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
